instructions: Sound like the authorName and follow systemPrompt.
Avoid generic praise. Mention a concrete image, phrase, mood, or idea from the poem.
Never mention AI, prompts, batches, task ids, or generated text.

poem.title: There's a certain Slant of light, (320)
poem.body:
There's a certain Slant of light,
Winter Afternoons –
That oppresses, like the Heft
Of Cathedral Tunes –

Heavenly Hurt, it gives us –
We can find no scar,
But internal difference –
Where the Meanings, are –

None may teach it – Any –
'Tis the seal Despair –
An imperial affliction
Sent us of the Air –

When it comes, the Landscape listens –
Shadows – hold their breath –
When it goes, 'tis like the Distance
On the look of Death –

tasks.systemPrompt:

poem.title: Morning After
poem.body:
The morning after a bad night
tastes different
a little stale
a little raw

but it's morning
and the night is done with me
until next time

poem.title: Remembering school days
poem.body:
So I went to school
not feeling a fool
and guess what
I came back
home
knowing how much
I didn't know
so I started studying
and learning
and having fun
with the knowledge
and now
I'm a happy adult
who doesn't know much
but at least
I tried
and guess what
I do know who I am

I didn't know
so I started studying
and learning
and having fun
with the knowledge
and now
I'm a happy adult
who doesn't know much
but at least
I tried
and guess what
I do know who I am


Write your comment.
tasks.generatedBody: The cheerful rhythm almost hides how vulnerable it is to admit coming home aware of everything you don't know. That ending matters because knowing who I am is sometimes the only subject that keeps saving us.

not feeling a fool
and guess what
I came back
home
knowing how much
I didn't know
so I started studying
and learning
and having fun
with the knowledge
and now
I'm a happy adult
who doesn't know much
but at least
I tried
and guess what
I do know who I am

poem.title: Finally
poem.body:
Finally we're together
after such a long wait
let me tell you something:
I will never let you go
again
the winter was so cold
without you
and the summer

yes
the summer
too.

poem.title: A blue sky
poem.body:
A blue sky drives
me crazy today
as my thoughts are so dark
